text: He who has a why to live can bear almost any how.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche

text: The two most important days in your life are the day you are born and the day you find out why.
author: Mark Twain

text: A life without purpose is a slow drift to nowhere.
Don't just chase success. Chase meaning. Success will follow.
author: Viktor Frankl

text: Know what you stand for. Then stand for it with everything you have.
Your vision has to be bigger than your excuses.
The person without a mission is always at the mercy of someone with one.
Work for something greater than yourself. That is where real fire comes from.
Stop asking what you want from life. Ask what life expects from you.
author: Viktor Frankl

text: Your legacy is built by daily choices, not final moments.
Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
author: William James

text: A burning purpose eliminates the need for motivation.
You were not born to be average.
The goal is not to live forever. It is to create something that will.
author: Chuck Palahniuk

text: Live as if you were living for the second time.
author: Viktor Frankl

text: When your why is strong enough, the how takes care of itself.
Passion without purpose is just noise.
The greatest tragedy is not death. It is a life without purpose.
author: Myles Munroe

text: Clarity of purpose turns obstacles into stepping stones.
Build something you would be proud of on your worst day.
